positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring anthropomorphic woodland animals like a playful fox, a curious bunny, and a wise owl, surrounded by oversized, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized floral elements. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a repeating apparel print pattern. Use a vibrant color palette of emerald green, deep sapphire blue, and electric teal, contrasted with creamy off-white accents. The style must be inspired by modern vector art and detailed illustration, maintaining clean lines, solid color blocks, and strong silhouette definition, similar to high-end textile art. Perfect for T-shirts and tote bags. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, lowres, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grayscale, photographic, photorealistic, grainy, blurry lines, messy, copyrighted characters
